title.en: China-to-Kazakhstan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入哈萨克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入哈薩克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Kazakhstan and EAEU electrical safety, EMC, GOST / ST RK / IEC 61851 expectations, connector compatibility, KEGOC grid-interface issues, EV policy, 50 Hz deployment, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与哈萨克斯坦及EAEU电气安全、EMC、GOST/ST RK/IEC 61851要求、连接器兼容性、KEGOC电网接口、电动车政策、50Hz部署以及中国GB/T 18487/GB/T 20234证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與哈薩克斯坦及EAEU電氣安全、EMC、GOST/ST RK/IEC 61851要求、連接器相容性、KEGOC電網介面、電動車政策、50Hz部署以及中國GB/T 18487/GB/T 20234證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EAC scope determination, Kazakhstan conformity assessment decision, KEGOC grid-connection approval, customs determination, procurement approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Kazakhstan, EAEU, GOST, ST RK, IEC, grid, customs, tax, and municipal installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EAC适用范围裁定、哈萨克斯坦合格评定决定、KEGOC并网批准、海关裁定、采购批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行哈萨克斯坦、EAEU、GOST、ST RK、IEC、电网、海关、税务及市政安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EAC適用範圍裁定、哈薩克斯坦合格評定決定、KEGOC併網批准、海關裁定、採購批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行哈薩克斯坦、EAEU、GOST、ST RK、IEC、電網、海關、稅務及市政安裝要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Kazakhstan, China GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 evidence is useful technical documentation but does not by itself close Kazakhstan market-access gaps. The main checks are EAEU TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage safety, TR CU 020/2011 EMC, applicable GOST / ST RK / IEC 61851 evidence, connector compatibility with IEC 62196 expectations where specified, 50 Hz suitability, and project-specific utility or KEGOC-related grid review for higher-power installations.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备出口哈萨克斯坦时，中国GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234证据可作为有用技术资料，但本身不能覆盖哈萨克斯坦市场准入差距。主要核查点包括EAEU TR CU 004/2011低压安全、TR CU 020/2011 EMC、适用的GOST/ST RK/IEC 61851证据、在被要求时与IEC 62196连接器预期的兼容性、50Hz适配，以及较大功率安装项目的公用事业或KEGOC相关并网审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備出口哈薩克斯坦時，中國GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234證據可作為有用技術資料，但本身不能覆蓋哈薩克斯坦市場准入差距。主要核查點包括EAEU TR CU 004/2011低壓安全、TR CU 020/2011 EMC、適用的GOST/ST RK/IEC 61851證據、在被要求時與IEC 62196連接器預期的相容性、50Hz適配，以及較大功率安裝項目的公用事業或KEGOC相關併網審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, tax authority, municipal authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
